purpose: Isolate and select geologically plausible basal-interface morphology before adding terrain, flight-height, material, or measurement nuisance diversity.

locked.cover_index_field: one shared deterministic field and hash for every shape
locked.material_table: one shared table and hash for every shape

canonical_release.shared_air_reference: required once before release when acquisition and source hashes are identical

shape_bank.description: Constant-depth basal interface. Never used as the main morphology claim.
Smooth monotonic dip across the aperture without steps.
One broad centre shallowing with tapered shoulders.
One broad centre deepening with tapered shoulders.
An asymmetric shoulder and smooth ramp with no vertical wall.
One broad high and one broad trough with unequal widths.
Two to four smooth extrema and low relief.
Four to seven smooth extrema and moderate relief.
A broad terrace connected by a distributed smooth ramp.
A broad asymmetric incision-like low without a sharp V.
A bounded offset spread over 2-4 m, never an abrupt vertical step.
A low-relief shoulder superposed on a long regional trend.

geometry_gates.quadratic_rejection: Reject candidate shapes with quadratic R2 > 0.985 and <= 1 extremum; calibration cases are exempt.

execution_stages.gate: geometry metrics, full-aperture preview, shared-factor hash equality
signed residual localized near geometric basal arrival

execution_stages.run: 32 traces at native indices 0,8,...,248 for full/control
execution_stages.gate: whole-aperture morphology, no interpolation, causal path continuity

execution_stages.run: 256 traces at 0.09 m and dl=0.0225 m for full/control
execution_stages.scope: four to six visually and numerically selected candidates
execution_stages.gate: 501x256 export, signed visible-phase extraction, human release decision

execution_stages.run: independent shape parameter seeds within accepted families
execution_stages.gate: scene-family split, no Line9 conditioning, duplicate and correlation audit
